---
title: "past_research"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly 
    highlight: tango
---

# Past Research

## Project: Amphibian Disease Immunology

Short 1–2 sentence description of the project.

### Publications

- **Smith, S., Goedeker, S., et al. (2024). Title of paper here. _Journal Name_.**  
  DOI: [https://doi.org/xx.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org/xx.xxxx/xxxxx) 
  ⭐ Highlight: Featured in journal spotlight article

- **Goedeker, S., et al. (2023). Another paper title. _Journal Name_.**  
  DOI: [https://doi.org/xx.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org/xx.xxxx/xxxxx)  

---

## Project: AI for Infectious Disease Prediction

Brief description of this project.

### Publications

- **Doe, J., Goedeker, S. (2022). Paper title. _Journal Name_.**  
  DOI: [https://doi.org/xx.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org/xx.xxxx/xxxxx) 
  ⭐ Highlight: Presented at international conference
